data.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
data.value_proposition: A campus-first marketplace that helps students buy, sell, and exchange used academic books at affordable prices.

features.name: Post used books
features.description: Allow students to list books and notes for sale or exchange.

features.name: Search by course
features.description: Let users find books by course, semester, and subject.

features.name: Direct contact
features.description: Enable buyers and sellers to contact each other directly.

features.name: Campus filtering
features.description: Show listings relevant to FAST campus users.

features.name: Wishlist alerts
features.description: Notify students when needed books are posted.

user_stories: As a student, I want to search books by course so I can find relevant material.
As a seller, I want to post my used books so I can recover costs.
As a buyer, I want to contact the seller directly so I can negotiate price.
data.reasoning: Fallback reasoning: generated a structured product specification for FAST BookSwap.

payload.details: Landing page generated with hero section, CTA button, features list, and email capture form using LLM.

content.description: FAST BookSwap is a campus marketplace for students to buy and sell used books locally.
content.cold_email:
Hi,

We built FAST BookSwap to help students save money on textbooks and trade locally on campus.

Join the waitlist today.
content.twitter_post: FAST BookSwap helps students save money on used books.
content.linkedin_post: FAST BookSwap is building a local campus marketplace for used textbooks.
content.instagram_post: Save money on books with FAST BookSwap.
content.slack_message: FAST BookSwap is live for campus book swapping.
